title: senecio umbellatus
intro: Senecio umbellatus, also known as round-leaved ragwort, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to Europe, western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and alkaloids. The health benefits of Senecio umbellatus include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, treat skin conditions, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
